Home Docs

API Overview

This is a test documentation page for baseline quality testing.

Getting Started

To use the API, you need to authenticate first.

Authentication

Use the following endpoint:

POST /api/v1/auth
{
  "username": "user",
  "password": "pass"
}

Endpoints

Method Path Description
GET /api/v1/users List all users
POST /api/v1/users Create a new user

Examples

Here's a Python example:

import requests

response = requests.get('https://api.example.com/v1/users')
print(response.json())

For more information, see the advanced guide.
